title: The Naked and the Wicked
actors: Carla Del Poggio, Frank Latimore, Gabriele Ferzetti
plot: Using actors' names since they differ in the dubbed versions: Carla Del Poggio is the wistful companion of opera star Madam Stefania Monti. Carla soon learns that Madam's accompanist, Gabriele Ferzetti, is fond of bedroom romps wi...
